About Us

Discover the story, values, and vision behind Longhorn Heights — where community comes first.

Our Community

Longhorn Heights was established in the early 1980s with a vision to create a close-knit, family-friendly neighborhood in the heart of Austin. What began as a modest development soon grew into a thriving community grounded in shared values. Over the years, Longhorn Heights has become a beloved Austin neighborhood, cherished for its friendly residents and beautiful homes.

350+

Living Families

120+

New Homes

50+

Amenities

10+

Years in Business

Our Vision

To foster a vibrant, safe, and connected community where every resident of Longhorn Heights feels valued, heard, and proud to call home.

Our Mission

To enhance the quality of life in Longhorn Heights by maintaining our neighborhood's beauty and always encouraging resident engagement.

Our Values

We believe in the strength of neighborly connections and shared responsibility. And we operate with honesty and consistent communication.

Management Company

Lone Star Property Management

Longhorn Heights is proudly managed by Lone Star Property Management, a locally based firm with extensive experience supporting Austin-area communities.

Contact Information

Office Hours

Monday – Friday: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM
Closed on weekends and public holidays

Stay Connected with Your Community

Have questions, concerns, or suggestions? Reach out to Longhorn Heights HOA board — we're here to help.
